## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `./mvnw clean verify`
- [ ] `./mvnw -B -ntp -Pquality verify` when applicable
- [ ] docs or samples updated when public behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/public-api.md`, `docs/stability.md`, and release docs reviewed when changing public or experimental behavior

## Compatibility

Describe any API, runtime, or build compatibility impact. State "none" if not applicable.

If this PR changes JavaScript behavior, state whether the change stays within the documented
experimental boundary.
